name: content-gen
description: AI-powered carousel and video content generation for TikTok, Instagram, and X

scripts.docker:instagram:morning: docker compose run --rm --no-deps autopost node code/posting/run-instagram-slot.js morning
scripts.docker:instagram:midday: docker compose run --rm --no-deps autopost node code/posting/run-instagram-slot.js midday
scripts.docker:instagram:evening: docker compose run --rm --no-deps autopost node code/posting/run-instagram-slot.js evening
scripts.docker:x:morning: docker compose run --rm --no-deps autopost node code/posting/run-x-slot.js morning
scripts.docker:x:midday: docker compose run --rm --no-deps autopost node code/posting/run-x-slot.js midday
scripts.docker:x:evening: docker compose run --rm --no-deps autopost node code/posting/run-x-slot.js evening
scripts.docker:tiktok:morning: docker compose run --rm --no-deps autopost node code/posting/run-tiktok-slot.js morning
scripts.docker:tiktok:evening: docker compose run --rm --no-deps autopost node code/posting/run-tiktok-slot.js evening

author: Content Gen
